description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image registry.gitlab.com/clarin-eric/build-image:1.3.5 with a docker:28.1.1-dind service and set Docker variables DOCKER_CERT_PATH, DOCKER_DRIVER, DOCKER_HOST, DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR, DOCKER_TLS_VERIFY and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive. Define stages lint, build, test, security, and release. In the lint stage add lint-dockerfile (runs timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --lint-docker) and shell-check (runs timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --lint-shell). In the build stage add a build job (tagged docker) that runs timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --build and archives all untracked files as artifacts. In the test stage add a test job (tagged docker) that depends on build and runs timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --test. In the security stage add informative-vulnerability-scan (allow_failure, runs timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --scan with SCAN_SEVERITY_THRESHOLD=low) and normative-vulnerability-scan (fails on any severity, runs timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --scan with SCAN_FAIL_ON=all, SCAN_SEVERITY_THRESHOLD=high, SNYK_POLICY_FILE=.snyk, tagged docker). In the release stage add a release job (tagged docker) that runs timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --release and is limited to tags or pipeline triggers.
